notes: Anthony Davis was once again the star, as he led the Pelicans with 28 points, 16 rebounds and four assists on 8 - of - 14 shooting. Jrue Holiday scored just seven points on 2 - of - 11 shooting, but did hand out 11 assists in the win. Langston Galloway and E'Twaun Moore combined for 33 points on 13 - of - 18 shooting off the bench.
